content:
### Task 1: Create the benchmark script with preflight and cleanup

# ── Config ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/.." && pwd)"
CORVIA="$REPO_ROOT/target/release/corvia"
CORVIA_INFERENCE="$REPO_ROOT/target/release/corvia-inference"
INFERENCE_PORT=8030
SERVER_PORT=8020
SCOPE_ID="corvia-introspect"
RESULTS_DIR=""
SKIP_SETUP=false
INFERENCE_PID=""
SERVER_PID=""


# ── Parse args ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
  case "$1" in
    --skip-setup)  SKIP_SETUP=true; shift ;;
    --results-dir) RESULTS_DIR="$2"; shift 2 ;;
    *)             echo "Unknown arg: $1"; exit 1 ;;
  esac
done

TIMESTAMP="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H-%M-%S)"
RESULTS_DIR="${RESULTS_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/benchmark-results/$TIMESTAMP}"
